title: junglemows.com
description: Botanical eCommerce in Barcelona. +100K € annual turnover, thousands of visits. WordPress, WooCommerce, design and implementation.
body: ## The project [JungleMows](https://junglemows.com) is a Barcelona business in the Gràcia neighborhood specializing in botanical experiences: terrarium and kokedama workshops, DIY kits for the home, and plants and interior decoration. Its mission is to reconnect urban people with nature, with an ecological and creative approach. Complete online store design and development on **WordPress + WooCommerce**: from product architecture and payment gateway to integration with social networks and internal management tools for workshop owners. ## Shop & catalog - Catalog structured in physical products (kokedames, DIY kits, plants, accessories) and services (workshops, corporate sessions) - **Gift cards** configurable for free or predefined amount, with redemption code integrated in WooCommerce - Coupons and **limited time offers** with countdown visible on the product - Free shipping from €49 · delivery in 24-48 hours via integrated carrier - Product listings optimized for SEO with `Product` and `Event` schema ## Reservations and calendars Seat reservation system for face-to-face workshops based on **WooCommerce Bookings**: - Event calendar with maximum capacity management per session - Date and time selection directly from the product sheet - Automatic confirmation by mail with a summary of the reservation and instructions - Waiting list management when a session is completed ## Tools for workshop workers Internal panel for the JungleMows team to manage their spaces without touching code: - Weekly agenda view with all sessions and confirmed attendees - Export of attendance lists per session (CSV / printout) - Capacity management and date blocking from the WordPress back-office - Automatic notifications to registrants in case of change or cancellation ## Social integration & sales on Instagram - Catalog synchronized with **Meta Commerce Manager** for direct sales on Instagram and Facebook Shop - Tagging of products in publications and *Stories* with direct link to the WooCommerce tab - Meta pixel configured for retargeting and conversion tracking - Automatically updated product feed (price, stock, images) ## Technical stack WordPress · WooCommerce · WooCommerce Bookings · WooCommerce Gift Cards · Meta Commerce Manager · Meta Pixel · PHP · MySQL · Custom CSS · Managed Hosting ## Results - **+€100,000** annual turnover - **Thousands of monthly organic visits** - Multiple sources of income integrated into a single platform: physical store, workshops, corporate and social networks
